testcases.input: DataFrame employees +---------+--------+ | name | salary | +---------+--------+ | Piper | 4548 | | Grace | 28150 | | Georgia | 1103 | | Willow | 6593 | | Finn | 74576 | | Thomas | 24433 | +---------+--------+ Output: +---------+--------+--------+ | name | salary | bonus | +---------+--------+--------+ | Piper | 4548 | 9096 | | Grace | 28150 | 56300 | | Georgia | 1103 | 2206 | | Willow | 6593 | 13186 | | Finn | 74576 | 149152 | | Thomas | 24433 | 48866 | +---------+--------+--------+ Explanation: A new column bonus is created by doubling the value in the column salary.
testcases.expectedOutput: +---------+--------+--------+ | name | salary | bonus | +---------+--------+--------+ | Piper | 4548 | 9096 | | Grace | 28150 | 56300 | | Georgia | 1103 | 2206 | | Willow | 6593 | 13186 | | Finn | 74576 | 149152 | | Thomas | 24433 | 48866 | +---------+--------+--------+ Explanation: A new column bonus is created by doubling the value in the column salary.
